channel.title: BetLegend Picks Latest Content
channel.description: Latest BetLegend featured games, previews, picks, and news.

item.title: Angels Team Total Under 3.5 vs Guardians Pick | BetLegend
item.description: Angels team total under 3.5 runs (-153) MLB pick vs Guardians for May 13, 2026. Parker Messick, Progressive Field, Angels strikeout profile, lineup risk, and the BetLegend handicap.

item.title: Model-Powered Sports Betting Simulations & Expert Picks | BetLegend
item.description: BetLegend runs 10,000 model-powered game simulations daily for NFL, NBA, NHL, MLB and college sports picks. Every pick posted pre-game, every result verified. See transparent records, daily previews, and betting tools.

item.title: Latest Published Pages | BetLegendPicks
item.description: Latest crawlable published pages from BetLegendPicks.

item.title: Vegas Golden Knights Moneyline -150 vs Ducks Game 5 Pick | BetLegend
item.description: Vegas Golden Knights moneyline -150 NHL pick for Game 5 vs Anaheim Ducks on May 12, 2026. Verified series context, odds math, player trends, special teams notes, and BetLegend Game 5 handicap.

item.title: Soccer Analysis - May 08, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: Soccer Friday May 8 2026. Bundesliga Round 33 Borussia Dortmund vs Eintracht Frankfurt 2:30 PM ET at Signal Iduna Park, Dortmund -200 over 1.5 at 1.11. La Liga Levante vs Osasuna 3:00 PM ET at Estadi Ciutat de Valencia with Levante chasing relegation survival and Osasuna chasing European qualification. Two pivotal European league fixtures, full preview.

item.title: NBA Analysis - May 08, 2026 | BetLegend
item.description: NBA Conference Semifinals Game 3 Friday May 8 2026. New York Knicks at Philadelphia 76ers 7 PM ET on Prime Video at Wells Fargo Center, PHI -1 with the moneyline at -112 and the total at 213.5, New York leads series 2-0. San Antonio Spurs at Minnesota Timberwolves 9:30 PM ET on Prime Video at Target Center, SAS -3.5 with the total at 215.5 and the moneyline at -175, series tied 1-1. Two East and West Game 3s, full preview and market snapshot.

item.title: MLB Previews Today - Daily Analysis & Betting Lines | BetLegend
item.description: Wednesday's MLB slate is led by Shohei Ohtani's return to the mound, Shota Imanaga vs Jesus Luzardo in Philadelphia, Dylan Cease's dominant Blue Jays run, and a full 15-game board across the league.

item.title: NBA Previews Today - Daily Analysis & Betting Lines | BetLegend
item.description: Wednesday's NBA card centers on Play-In Tournament Day 2, with Magic at 76ers for the East 7 seed and Warriors at Clippers in a Western Conference elimination game.
